prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年四川大学在海南省综合科类最低录取位次分别为约1352名→1667名→2603名→1507名→1993名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2021至2023年位次从1352后移至26 03，2024年短暂回升至1507后，2025年又回落至1993名，近5年波动幅度较大，2025年基准位次约1993名；四川大学在海南省综合科类招生计划2021–2023年均为 58人，2024年降至56人，2025年回升至57人；2026年综合科类计划大幅缩减至38人，较2025年减少约33.3%，缩招幅度显著，竞争压力明显加大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名长期稳居全国前20（2021年第14→2022年第11→2023年第12→2024年第15→2025年第15→2026年第16），属 于国内顶尖综合性大学，办学层次极高；2026年高考周期内四川大学声誉评价为「明显负面」，涉及教师学术不端举报、师德师风问题等多起舆情事件（51个事 件中46个负面）；2023年投档异常评价为「高关注」（12个事件），新闻专业位次下降、地铁事件等引发广泛讨论；抖音热度排名第35（较热），综合热度约131万，关注度中等 偏上。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年海南省高考考生 总数约78,000人，较2025年67,408人增长约15.7%，考生规模明显扩大，竞争加剧。计算机类、电子信息类、口腔医学等热门专业持续高热 ，而新闻传播类专业因舆情影响热度有所降温；四川大学位于四川省成都市，海南省考生为跨省报考，无本地招生倾斜；该校在海南招生计划占比较小，地域偏 好因素影响有限；整体声誉负面信号可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制；四川大学拥有19个A-及以上学科，其中口腔医学（A+）、中国语言文学（A+）、护理学（A+） 为顶尖，临床医学（A）、化学（A）、数学（A）、药学（A）、计算机科学与技术（A-）等学科实力雄厚，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1993名、2026年招生计划大幅缩招33.3%（从57人降至38人）、海南省考生总数增长约15.7%以及声誉负面信号等多重因素 。考虑到缩招和考生增加加剧竞争，但声誉负面可能抑制部分报考热度，经有限修正后预测2026年最低录取位次约1624名，位次区间 1429–1819名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Sichuan University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 1352 → 1667 → 2603 → 1507 → 1993, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. From 2021 to 2023, rankings shifted from 1352 to 2603, briefly recovered to 1507 in 2024, then fell back to 1993 in 2025, with significant fluctuations over the past 5 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1993. The enrollment plan for Sichuan University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category was 58 students from 2021 to 2023, dropped to 56 in 2024, and rebounded to 57 in 2025. In 2026, the comprehensive category plan is sharply reduced to 38 students, a decrease of about 33.3% compared to 2025, indicating a significant reduction in enrollment and notably increased competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. It has consistently ranked among the top 20 nationally in the Soft Science China University Rankings (14th in 2021 → 11th in 2022 → 12th in 2023 → 15th in 2024 → 15th in 2025 → 16th in 2026), belonging to the top-tier comprehensive universities in China with an extremely high level of education. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Sichuan University's reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative', involving multiple public opinion incidents such as reports of academic misconduct by faculty and issues of teacher ethics (46 negative out of 51 events). The abnormal admission evaluation for 2023 is 'high attention' (12 events), with declines in journalism major rankings and the subway incident sparking widespread discussion. Douyin popularity ranking is 35th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.31 million, indicating moderate to high attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Hainan Province is approximately 78,000, an increase of about 15.7% from 67,408 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Stomatology continue to be highly sought after, while Journalism and Communication majors have seen a decline in popularity due to public opinion impacts. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, and Hainan candidates are applying across provinces, with no local enrollment preference. The university's enrollment plan in Hainan accounts for a relatively small proportion, so regional preference factors have limited influence. The overall negative reputation signals may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Sichuan University has 19 disciplines rated A- or above, with Stomatology (A+), Chinese Language and Literature (A+), and Nursing (A+) being top-tier, and Clinical Medicine (A), Chemistry (A), Mathematics (A), Pharmacy (A), and Computer Science and Technology (A-) having strong academic strength, attracting high-scoring candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1993, the significant 33.3% reduction in enrollment plan for 2026 (from 57 to 38 students), the approximately 15.7% increase in the total number of Hainan candidates, and negative reputation signals. Given that enrollment reduction and candidate increase intensify competition, but negative reputation may suppress some application enthusiasm, after limited correction, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 1624, with a ranking range of 1429–1819.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Sichuan University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category in 2026 will be approximately 1624, with a range of 1429–1819. Candidates with rankings within the upper limit of the range (1819) can focus on Tier 2 majors as their primary choices, with Tier 1 majors (Stomatology, Clinical Medicine, Computer Science) as reach goals. Candidates with rankings above the lower limit of the range (1429) can boldly aim for top Tier 1 majors. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options to ensure admission.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 四川大学在海南省医学类单独招生，2021年至2025年最低录取位次分别为1134、3201、2721、2624、3029，呈现波动上升趋势。2021年位次最低（1134），2022年大幅上升至320 1后，2023-2024年略有回落至2721和2624，2025年再度回升至3029。招生计划方面，2021年8人、2022年10人、2023年11人、2024年17人、2025年20人，持续扩招。2026年计划维 持20人不变，与2025年持平，扩招趋势暂停。计划不变意味着无法通过增加名额来缓解竞争，位次有继续上升的压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，位列国家985工程、211工程和双一流建设高校，综合实力位居全国前列。其华西医学中心历史悠久，口腔医学、临床医学等学科享有极 高声誉，在全国医学教育领域具有重要影响力，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续高涨，临床医学、口腔医学等专业长期处于高位竞争状态。海南省医学类招生规模相对有限，四川大学2026年在海南医学类仅投放20个计划，供 需矛盾突出。护理学因选科要求相对宽松（化学必选），成为医学类中位次最低的专业，但整体医学类竞争依然激烈。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动趋势、2026年招生计划持平以及医学类专业持续高热度的背景，预计2026年四川大学在海南省医学类最低录取位次约为3079名，较2025年（3029名）略有上升 ，反映竞争进一步加剧。预测区间为2925至3233名，考生在此区间内报考有较大录取机会。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Sichuan University conducts separate enrollment for medical programs in Hainan Province. From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings were 1134, 3201, 2721, 2624, and 3029 respectively, showing a fluctuating upward trend. The ranking was lowest in 2021 (1134), rose sharply to 3201 in 2022, then slightly declined to 2721 and 2624 in 2023-2024, before rising again to 3029 in 2025. In terms of enrollment plan, there were 8 students in 2021, 10 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 17 in 2024, and 20 in 2025, with continuous expansion. The 2026 plan remains at 20, unchanged from 2025, indicating a pause in the expansion trend. The unchanged plan means competition cannot be alleviated by increasing slots, putting upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, listed among the national 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction universities, with comprehensive strength ranking among the top in the country. Its West China Medical Center has a long history, with disciplines such as Stomatology and Clinical Medicine enjoying extremely high reputations, exerting significant influence in the field of medical education nationwide, and attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical programs has continued to rise, with Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, and other specialties remaining in high competition. The scale of medical enrollment in Hainan Province is relatively limited. In 2026, Sichuan University will only offer 20 slots for medical programs in Hainan, leading to a prominent supply-demand contradiction. Nursing, due to relatively lenient subject requirements (Chemistry mandatory), has become the program with the lowest ranking within the medical category, but overall competition in medical programs remains intense.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the fluctuating trend of historical rankings, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, and the sustained high popularity of medical programs, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Sichuan University's medical programs in Hainan Province in 2026 will be approximately 3079, slightly higher than the 2025 ranking of 3029, reflecting further intensification of competition. The predicted range is 2925 to 3233. Candidates within this range have a greater chance of admission.
